desc_da: Skridsikker måtte der giver greb og polstring under praksis. Fås i forskellige tykkelser og materialer.
desc_en: Non-slip mat providing grip and cushioning during practice. Available in various thicknesses and materials.

desc_da: Rektangulær blok af kork, skum eller træ. Bruges til at 'bringe gulvet op' og tilpasse stillinger.
desc_en: Rectangular block of cork, foam, or wood. Used to 'bring the floor up' and adapt poses.

desc_da: Bælte eller strop der forlænger rækkevidden i stræk. Uvurderligt hjælpemiddel til stramme muskler.
desc_en: Belt or strap that extends reach in stretches. Invaluable aid for tight muscles.

desc_da: Firm, lang pude brugt i restorativ yoga og yin yoga til at understøtte kroppen i passive stillinger.
desc_en: Firm, long cushion used in restorative and yin yoga to support the body in passive poses.

desc_da: Foldet tæppe brugt til polstring under knæ, hæle eller sæde. Bruges også til varme under Shavasana.
desc_en: Folded blanket used for cushioning under knees, heels, or seat. Also used for warmth during Shavasana.

desc_da: Cirkulært hjul brugt til at støtte rygsøjlen i backbends, åbne skuldre og fordybe stræk.
desc_en: Circular wheel used to support the spine in backbends, open shoulders, and deepen stretches.

desc_da: Rund eller halvmåneformet pude der løfter hofterne under siddende meditation for komfortabel alignment.
desc_en: Round or crescent-shaped cushion that elevates the hips during seated meditation for comfortable alignment.

desc_da: Let, ofte lavendel-fyldt pude der placeres over øjnene under Shavasana for at blokere lys og fremme afslapning.
desc_en: Light, often lavender-filled pillow placed over the eyes during Shavasana to block light and promote relaxation.
